body.title: uurecall: fall back to IGOR_HOME_DB_URL when UU_HOME_DB_URL unset
body.result: uurecall palace search now falls back to IGOR_HOME_DB_URL; .bashrc exports UU_HOME_DB_URL alias
body.intention: I intend that uurecall palace search works in any session where IGOR_HOME_DB_URL is set, without requiring a separate UU_HOME_DB_URL export.
body.description:
uurecall.py _search_palace() checks os.environ.get(UU_HOME_DB_URL) and skips palace search when not set. But .bashrc only exports IGOR_HOME_DB_URL. Same DB, different name. Palace and semantic results silently empty every session.

Fix: fall back to IGOR_HOME_DB_URL when UU_HOME_DB_URL absent. Also add UU_HOME_DB_URL export to .bashrc as alias.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/uurecall.py (_search_palace, _search_semantic); ~/.bashrc
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: db_url fallback; .bashrc alias. OUT: changing search logic.
**Completion criteria:** uurecall hubert in fresh shell returns palace node results, not skip message.
